# complete

Complete processing of the memory after an I/O transfer finishes.

## Declaration

```swift
virtual IOReturn complete(
 IODirection forDirection = forDirection); 
```

## Parameters

- **forDirection**: The direction of the I/O just completed, or kIODirectionNone for the direction specified by the memory descriptor.

## Return Value

An IOReturn code.

## Overview

This method should not be called unless a prepare was previously issued; the prepare() and complete() must occur in pairs, before and after an I/O transfer involving pageable memory.

## Miscellaneous

- **getPhysicalSegment**: Break a memory descriptor into its physically contiguous segments.
- **initWithDescriptors**: Initialize an IOMultiMemoryDescriptor to describe a memory area made up of several other IOMemoryDescriptors.
- **prepare**: Prepare the memory for an I/O transfer.
- **withDescriptors(IOMemoryDescriptor **, UInt32, IODirection, bool)**: Create an IOMultiMemoryDescriptor to describe a memory area made up of several other IOMemoryDescriptors.
- **withDescriptors(IOMemoryDescriptor **, UInt32, IODirection, bool)**: Initialize an IOMultiMemoryDescriptor to describe a memory area made up of several other IOMemoryDescriptors.
